info.name: Ginja Console — Platform API
info.description: Generated from controller classes (verified). 80 endpoints across 15 controllers.

request.description: Generate 10 single-use MFA recovery codes (bearer). Returns plaintext ONCE; invalidates previous set.
Remaining unused backup codes (count only; codes never returned again).

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Console home — one aggregate read (KPIs, tenant status, onboarding funnel, approvals, recent activity, health).

request.description: Aggregated console overview. Roles: PLATFORM_ADMIN/SUPPORT/PLATFORM_APPROVER/PLATFORM_ENGINEER.
Replace a role's data-residency region scopes (empty/omitted = no restriction). Regions come from /platform/settings/data-residency.

body.raw:
{
  "code": "REPORTS_EXPORT",
  "name": "Export Reports",
  "description": "Allows exporting directories, logs and reports",
  "group_code": "OBSERVABILITY",
  "group_label": "Observability",
  "sensitive": false
}

{
  "code": "DEDICATED",
  "name": "Dedicated database",
  "description": "Tenant gets its own database.",
  "enabled": true,
  "sort_order": 4
}

request.description: All active sessions across users (admin/support). Enriched with account/user/browser/os/device + current flag.
Revoke a single session by id (PLATFORM_ADMIN).
Revoke all active sessions of a member (PLATFORM_ADMIN). Returns {revoked:n}.
MFA adoption summary + per-user enrolment (admin/support). methods=totp/sms/webauthn; backup_codes/enabled_on null (not modeled).
One user's MFA detail (admin/support).
Send an MFA-enrolment reminder to a user (PLATFORM_ADMIN). Audit-logged.
Password-expiry summary + per-user status (admin/support). status=ok/soon/expired/pending from passwordChangedAt + policy.
One user's password status (admin/support).
Force a password reset (PLATFORM_ADMIN): revokes sessions + reset notification. Audit-logged.
Platform-default locale/formatting (admin/support).
Partial update of localization settings (admin).
Current published validation ruleset + grouped rules (admin/support).
Ruleset version history (admin/support).
Create/return an editable DRAFT cloning current rules (admin).
Save the draft's grouped rules (admin).
Publish the draft (archives prior published) (admin).
Restore a prior version as a new published version (admin).
Live-test a value against a rule pattern + normalize steps (admin/support).
Stream the filtered audit trail as CSV (default) or JSON (?format=json). Roles: PLATFORM_ADMIN/SUPPORT.
Minimal ACTIVE pricing structures for the onboarding subscription-model picker (no components/tiers). PLATFORM_ADMIN.
List payers with optional filters (status, payer_type, from_date/to_date), sorting and pagination. Returns a paged envelope {content,page,size,total_elements,total_pages}. PLATFORM_ADMIN.

Multipart upload. The `file` part carries the bytes (ops proxies them to ginja-ai-document-service); `category` is required, `description` and `expiry_date` are optional. Select a file for the `file` part before sending.

Fetches a tenant document's metadata plus a freshly issued, time-limited pre-signed download URL from ginja-ai-document-service. `documentId` is the business id (DOC...) and must belong to the tenant under the payer. Returns 404 if the payer, tenant, or document is unknown.
Partial update of a tenant on a DRAFT payer (only sent fields applied). 409 if not DRAFT / dup subdomain or (legal,country). Returns PayerResponse.
Delete a SECONDARY tenant on a DRAFT payer. 409 if not DRAFT or deleting the primary. Returns refreshed PayerResponse.

query.description: optional: filter to a teammate's drafts

request.description: 'Onboarding drafts in progress' directory panel. Returns a LIST where each item is the same OnboardingProgressResponse as GET /platform/payers/{payerId}/steps (completed/total/progress_pct/completed_steps/incomplete_steps/steps[]). Optional ?assignee= for 'By teammate'. PLATFORM_ADMIN.

item.name: Payer Approval
item.description: Final maker-checker gate. Only payers whose every tenant is READY_TO_ACTIVATE (provisioning complete, §Provisioning) appear in the queue / can be approved; approving earlier returns 409. Approve auto-activates (go-live); submitter != approver is enforced (403).

item.name: Approval Queue

request.description: Maker-checker approval queue (lean rows). ?status=pending|approved|all. PLATFORM_APPROVER.
Full review payload for one request: header + review meta (status, can_decide, sections, auto_activate_note) + full payer aggregate. PLATFORM_APPROVER.

item.description: Final maker-checker gate. Only payers whose every tenant is READY_TO_ACTIVATE (provisioning complete, §Provisioning) appear in the queue / can be approved; approving earlier returns 409. Approve auto-activates (go-live); submitter != approver is enforced (403).

item.name: Provisioning

request.description: Save a config section. For DOMAINS_SSL, include `subdomain` (validated, unique — persisted onto the tenant) and optional `custom_domain`; other sections carry their own keys (provider, host, from_address, …). Set the `section` path var to one of DATABASE|DOMAINS_SSL|EMAIL|SMS|DATA_MIGRATION.

item.description: Tenant Provisioning (PRD step 6). Lifecycle: Onboarding (6 steps) -> Submit -> PROVISIONING (assign engineer; configure DATABASE/DOMAINS_SSL/SMS/EMAIL/DATA_MIGRATION; subdomain is set in DOMAINS_SSL) -> all sections DONE => READY_TO_ACTIVATE -> final maker-checker Approval -> auto-Activate. Approval is blocked (409) until every tenant is READY_TO_ACTIVATE.
